phonetic: 藢sju藧d蓹(蕣)藞m蓹蕣n蓹s; sju藧藞d蓲m蓹n忙s
examples: Results show that the pseudomonas fluorescens obviously promotes the growth of the poplar.
Tomato bacterial speck caused by Pseudomonas syringae is an important disease for the production and the quality of tomato.
Then back in Spain, they trained a strain of Pseudomonas bacteria to preferentially nibble salt blooms.
The minister said he accepted all 32 recommendations made by Professor Troop's pseudomonas review team.
Pat Troop was questioned by the health committee about her review of the pseudomonas outbreak.
